title: Dr. Beckmann Colour Collector 3in1 | Prevents colour runs |50 sheets
features: Provides the ultimate protection from colour runs with our in wash sheet
Revitalises the vibrancy of colours, making laundry look and feel new for longer!
Prevents fading by smoothing rough fibres (bobbling).
High-absorbing sheet powered by innovative Colour & Fibre Care technology
No more endless sorting = fuller mixed washloads of whites, darks and coloured laundry.
description: Product Description When you wash your garments, colour and dirt can be released into the water. If not collected, this can end up on your laundry causing discoloration, colour runs & greying! With frequent washes, clothes often lose their vibrancy. Dr. Beckmann Colour Collector 3-in-1 sheets act like a magnet to trap loose dye from the water, ensuring ultimate protection from unsightly colour runs & dulling. The sheets reduce your half-full wash loads by allowing you to mix multiple coloured garments in one wash! Therefore saving time, water and energy. What's more, the new integrated Colour & Fibre Care technology prevents fading by smoothing bobbling and revitalising the vibrancy of colours. This improves the overall look of your clothes, making them look and feel new for longer! HOW TO USE IT: 1. Fill your washing machine with your laundry and add detergent as recommended. 2. Place 1-2 sheets in your washing machine, depending on the colour intensity of your laundry. Start the desired washing cycle. 3. Allow the sheet to collect any loose colour and dirt from your wash. Then simply remove the sheet at the end of the cycle and dispose of in the normal waste. IMPORTANT INFORMATION: - Always follow fabric care instructions and the manufacturer‘s manual. - New coloured items should be washed separately the first few times. - Use 3 sheets for heavily dyed garments (e.g. dark jeans, silk fabrics). - Product performance cannot be guaranteed where there is an excessive amount of colour bleed. - Do not use for personal care. ECO CONTRIBUTION: - Sheet made with fibres of natural origin - No perfume - Less sorting for fuller machines, saving time, water & energy. - Works from 20 °C - Recycled & recyclable box - Packaging FSC® certified - Prolongs the longevity of your garments, making them look newer and in better condition for longer. Ingredients / Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Manufacturer Contact Information Mallison Street Astley Bridge Bolton Bl1 8Pp See more
